title: Buyer Plugin
description:
Allows players to earn starting money by selling items to the server.
multilanguage support
body:
**The plugin allows players to earn starting money by selling items to the server.**

![Usage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9d6ca7bd750e59d3a56978b6fb5ec404b0b3962.png)
**Vault and Essentials are required for operation.**
- Supported languages: English, Russian, Ukrainian, Spanish, French.
(Can be changed in config.yml)

### Player commands:
/sell - Opens the item sales menu

Items that cannot be sold will be returned to the player's inventory.

### Administrator commands:
/sellplugin reload - Reloads the config

**You can add items or change their prices in config.yml**

**If you encounter a bug or notice that something isn't working properly, change debug to true in config.yml file. Then send the information from the console to me in discord altov1337.**
